title: Castle Lands

{{Quote|Great spitcrete vessels weep dew above the Castle Lands; their engines scorch the air. Dartship swarms shade the sky, humming a song of farewell.|Vector Hyllus recalls the [[Great Migration]]|<ref name="Star Wars: The Old Republic">''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]''</ref>}}
The '''Castle Lands''' was a region located across the northern steppes of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]].<ref name="ISWU" /> While mostly plains, the Castle Lands also included the [[Kaamos Territory]], north of the [[Juran Mountains/Legends|Juran Mountains]] and the [[Glarus Valley]].

==History==
The [[Killik/Legends|Killiks]], a [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Insectoid/Legends|insectoids]], lived on these plains in ancient times. Prior to [[30,000 BBY]], the Killiks built a series of towering, castle-like [[Killik hive mound|hive mounds]] in the plains. Those castles contained a complex network of [[Egg/Legends|egg]]-laying grottoes, the chambers of which were decorated with [[Color/Legends|colorful]] mosaics made of [[Stone/Legends|stones]] and pebbles. The Killiks had christened the settlement '''Oroboro''', which literally meant "our home" in [[Killik (language)|their language]].<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|II|217|Killik}}</ref>

Around 30,000 BBY, a race of powerful aliens known as the [[Celestial/Legends|Celestials]] removed the Killiks from Alderaan.<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> They did so in a protective measure, as the Killiks had consumed all the natural resources of their green planet and were bent on exploiting other worlds in the same ravenous fashion.<ref name="CSWE" />

In [[27,500 BBY]],<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> [[Human/Legends|Human]] colonists from [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] arrived on Alderaan. By that time, the Killiks had long been emptied from Oroboro, and the sole evidence of their existence was their empty, petrified hive mounds.<ref name="Codex: History of Alderaan">{{TORcite|type=codex|History of Alderaan}}</ref> Shrouded in mystery, the towering abandoned cities of the Killiks became known as the Castle Lands.<ref name="BTM">''[[Star Wars: Behind the Magic]]''</ref> During the millennia of Human occupation, the abandoned hives remained untouched, as a symbol of how civilizations could fall.<ref name="ISWU" />

[[File:Killikmounds.jpg|thumb|left|180px|A concentration of Killik mounds]]
In the last days of the planet, the Castle Lands of Alderaan was an area of inspiration and meditation for many [[Alderaanian/Legends|Alderaanian]] artists and philosophers. Some of the organic-looking monoliths were even retrofitted with all modern comforts. While the Humans from Alderaan had not been the first inhabitants of the planet, they had perfectly integrated the Killik Castles into their own culture.<ref name="ISWU" /> In the last decades of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], the Killik region also hosted animals the wool of which was used to make traditional Alderaanian long [[Clothing/Legends|coats]].<ref name="AOC:VD">''[[Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith: The Visual Dictionary]]''</ref>

Like the rest of Alderaan, it was destroyed by the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star's]] [[Superlaser/Legends|superlaser]].<ref name="ANH" /> However, the Killiks built many mounds similar to these off world after their exile into the [[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown Regions]], such as on their capital world [[Yoggoy]].
